description: A maintenance technician used the last spare gasket of a specific type. They need to record its use and trigger a reorder.

nodes.task_description: Identify the part number for the gasket used.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct part number from the equipment's bill of materials.

nodes.task_description: Record the use of one unit of the gasket in the inventory system, which brings the on-hand quantity to zero.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the spare part inventory.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically flags the part for reorder because the quantity is below the minimum level. Confirm and submit the purchase requisition.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the auto-generated purchase requisition to restock the part.
